rationale: Both reviews yield the same resulting PR: Review 1's three findings (hb0 duplication at Quadratic.lean:80, field_simp/show hack at 95, and Finset.prod_map rfl at SquareClass.lean:301) are real but trivial stylistic nits in working (commented, documented) proof code that no maintainer would require; acting on them changes nothing material under proof-quality. Review 2 correctly identifies no material issues.
